name: Nosferatu Lilinor
short_description: It is cute but extremely hard!!! The immortal girl keeps to be reborn any number of times even if she gets beaten. It is an action game that includes puzzle-like elements by learning the movement and timing of the enemies.
detailed_description:
Update Notes


About Ver.1.1.1 Update
-Fixed a bug with Steam Cloud support.



About Ver.1.1.0 Update
-Steam Cloud is now supported.
-Fixed stage 4-1 regarding enemy behavior.
-Some effects have been updated.



Ver.1.0.10 update's details
-Added explanatory text to the difficulty selection screen and changed the layout.
-Adjusted death log performance.
-Fixed the behavior of some bosses.
-Fixed a bug that prevented the waiting motion of some character skins from occurring.
-Fixed minor bugs.



Ver.1.0.9 update's details
-Now compatible with PlayStation 4 controller, PlayStation 5 controller, and Nintendo Switch Pro controller.
-When pressing the summon button with a diagonal input that contains an upper element, the summon will now be executed horizontally.
-Adjusted the event direction.
-Fixed minor bugs.



Ver.1.0.8 update's details
-Added a new skin "Snow Dress".
-Added difficulty levels.
-Updated some graphics.
-Fixed minor bugs.



Ver.1.0.7 update's details
-Added a new skin "Halloween Dress".
-Reduced downward hit collision during a jump.
-Fixed a problem with synchronizing save data.
-Other minor adjustments were made.



Ver.1.0.6 update's details
-Even you quit the game, your Blood Points will save automatically.
-The invincible time, when you use skill “Summon Zasha” now extended.
-BGM for each area has been updated.
-Fixed minor bugs.


Ver.1.0.5 update's details
-Added support for German and French.
-Fixed auto-save while stage changing .
-Fixed a bug related to the behavior of enemy during stun.
-Updated some effects.
-Fixed minor bugs.



Ver.1.0.4 update's details
-Added "Death Log" function to the option.
-Updated some BGM.



Ver.1.0.3 update's details
-Added new skin "Santa Dress".
-Added support for Spanish (Latin America).
-Fixed minor bugs.


Ver.1.0.2 update's details
-Added new skin "Uni Akatsuki".
-Added support for Korean language.
-Adjusted the difficulty of stage 3-6.
-Fixed minor bugs.


Ver.1.0.1 update's details
-Fixed the problem that save data may not be synchronized correctly, during offline operation.
-Fixed an issue that effects were not correctly show in high fps output while stage clear.


About the Game

It is cute but extremely hard!!!
The immortal girl keeps to be reborn any number of times even if she gets beaten.
It is an action game that includes puzzle-like elements by learning the movement and timing of the enemies.





Story
The habitation was ravaged by Vampire hunters and a Vampire girl named Lilinor traveled with her follower Zasha to find a new castle.
After traveling for a while, they found the remains in the depths of the forest off the road.
However, the demons already lived there ...
“For now, let's go to the lowest level. we must defeat the big shots and make the hierarchical relationship clear.”

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, French, German
